creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
On Sun, 15 Jan 2012 12:07:42 -0600
Chuck Burns <chuck@thesouthernlibertarian.com> wrote:

> That patch still leaves a bad Makefile in place. One that does not
> add the proper threaded library when OpenEXR is built with clang,
> since clang does not, and will never, support the -dumpspecs
> parameter. Also, using `` in a Makefile is poor form.
> 
> This patch does both. Upgrades OpenEXR to 1.7, AND fixes the problem
> in the Makefile so it can be properly built with clang.
> 
> Chuck Burns

Ah, yes, good catch there.  It's been a while, in fact, since I
submitted this patch.  At the time, the feedback I got was that it
would be deferred until after 9.0-RELEASE, as it does affect a number
of other ports as well.

Thanks for coming up with those corrections.  I bow to your superior
"portsmanship".  :-)

Conrad

-- 
Conrad J. Sabatier
conrads@cox.net
